schema.name: TZPID source truth generated from canonical equation master

identity.canonical_title: Spectral Decomposition and Bessel Eigenmodes: φ_n,m(r,θ)

theory.canonical_statement: with eigenfunctions \[ \phi_{n,m}(r,\theta) = J_m(k_{n,m} r)\, e^{i m \theta}, \] where \( J_m \) are Bessel functions of the first kind and \( k_{n,m} \) are fixed by boundary conditions (zeros of \( J_m \) or its derivative).
theory.technical_interpretation: Spectral Decomposition and Bessel Eigenmodes: φ_n,m(r,θ) is an algebraic definition, written φ_n,m(r,θ) = J_m(k_n,m r) e^i m θ. It is an algebraic definition expressing the quantity directly in terms of the variables on its right-hand side. It is built from θ, J_m, k_n,m, r, m, defining φ_n,m(r,θ). Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.

formation.note: Introduced in the derivation where where are Bessel functions of the first kind and are fixed by boundary conditions (zeros of or its derivative).
